data.content: Shipment complete. Merged fix/dc62-ui-panel-style into main (d8e134fd51ca). Resolved one merge conflict in beats-page-layout.test.ts (combined feature branch sub-component references with main's added test variables using src() helper). All 2239 tests pass across 165 files. Zero ESLint warnings in all 8 scoped files. TypeScript compiles cleanly. Pushed to origin/main.
